steps.title: Identify the two charges
steps.content: The rental costs 14 dollars per day, so $d$ days cost $14d$. The booking fee is a one-time 9-dollar charge.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content: Add the daily charge and the one-time fee: $$c=14d+9.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: $c=14d+9$ matches C. The other choices either swap the daily rate and fee or multiply the one-time fee by the number of days.
